title: Search/Screen pop via a URL
excerpt:
Is it possible to open monday with a url that can find and search for a customer/contact based on a phone number? 
e.g. 
https://monday.com/contacts/search?phone=xxxxxxx

posts.author: bsutton (Brett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to open monday with a url that can find and search for a customer/contact based on a phone number?

e.g.
https://monday.com/contacts/search?phone=xxxxxxx
